text: Which of the following statements is true concerning life jackets?

options.text: A) Buoyant vests may be substituted for life jackets
B) Life jackets are designed to turn an unconscious person's face clear of water
C) Lifejackets must always be worn with the same side facing outwards to float
D) Lightly stained or faded life jackets will fall in the water and should not be used
